body:
You should have your garage door professionally serviced in Pleasanton **at least once per year**. [How Often Does My Garage Door Need to be Serviced?](https://www.wayne-dalton.com/where-to-buy/sales-and-service/blogs/detail/wdss-blogs/how-often-does-my-garage-door-need-to-be-serviced)

This annual check ensures that the components are lubricated, springs are balanced, and cables are not frayed, which is crucial for safety and longevity given the heavy daily use typical in residential homes.

**Key Reasons for Annual Maintenance in Pleasanton:**

  * **Preventive Inspection:** Technicians check for wear-and-tear on hardware, preventing costly emergency repairs.
  * **Component Lubrication:** Moving parts are lubricated, reducing noise and friction.
  * **Safety Testing:** Professionals ensure safety sensors are working correctly and the door reverses automatically, which is vital for child and pet safety. [How Often Does My Garage Door Need to be Serviced?](https://www.wayne-dalton.com/where-to-buy/sales-and-service/blogs/detail/wdss-blogs/how-often-does-my-garage-door-need-to-be-serviced)[How often does a home garage door need to be serviced? : r/GarageDoorService](https://www.reddit.com/r/GarageDoorService/comments/1f53fr2/how_often_does_a_home_garage_door_need_to_be/)[How Often Does a Garage Door Need Servicing?](https://ryedalegaragedoors.co.uk/blog-how-often-does-a-garage-door-need-servicing/)[Signs Your Garage Door Needs Repairs & When to Call a Pro](https://www.rjgaragedoors.com.au/news/signs-your-garage-door-needs-repairs-when-to-call-a-specialist)[Blog](https://www.montrosegaragedoors.com/blog)

**Factors Affecting Frequency:**  
If your garage door is frequently used, older, or exposed to significant weather elements, you may want to consider professional maintenance more often.

Would you like recommendations for local garage door technicians in the Pleasanton area for this maintenance?
